understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), using at most 2 attempts per level and within the turn limit per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`) or `CLICK` (optionally `UNDO`). After a horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile (`o`/`m`/`w`), reaches the goal (`+`), or hits a hazard (spikes) which immediately ends the attempt. `CLICK` removes clickable/breakable tiles (e.g., `x`) at a specified `[x,y]` to open or change fall paths without moving the character; `UNDO` reverts the previous action.

understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` on each level without landing on spike tiles (`u`/`v`), using at most 2 attempts per level and within the turn limit per attempt.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Each turn you choose a horizontal move (`MOVE_LEFT`/`MOVE_RIGHT`) or `CLICK` (optionally `UNDO`). After a horizontal move, gravity automatically carries the character in the current gravity direction until it lands on a solid/support tile (`o`/`m`/`w`), reaches the goal (`+`), or hits a hazard (spikes) which immediately ends the attempt. `CLICK` removes clickable/breakable tiles (e.g., `x`) at a specified `[x,y]` to open or change fall paths without moving the character; `UNDO` reverts the previous action.
